name: 100 MG Erlotinib Tablets IP
about: 100 MG Erlotinib Tablets IP are a medication used in the treatment of lung cancer. These tablets have a shelf life of 12-24 months and come in a tablet dosage form. The fermentation smell of these tablets is normal. They are produced in India and should be stored in a dry place. Erlotinib is a tyrosine kinase inhibitor, which works by blocking the action of an abnormal protein that signals cancer cells to multiply. This medication can help to slow or stop the growth of cancer cells. It is important to take these tablets exactly as prescribed by a doctor.

faq.q: What is the shelf life of 100 MG Erlotinib Tablets IP?
faq.a: The shelf life of these tablets is 12-24 months.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of 100 MG Erlotinib Tablets IP?
faq.a: These tablets come in a tablet dosage form.

faq.q: What is the origin of these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets are produced in India.

faq.q: How should these tablets be stored?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry place.
Erlotinib is a tyrosine kinase inhibitor, which works by blocking the action of an abnormal protein that signals cancer cells to multiply.
